---
name: Spec Clarification
about: >-
  The spec is ambiguous, underspecified, or unclear — not technically wrong,
  but hard to implement consistently across runtimes.
title: "[clarification] "
labels: ["clarification", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

<!--
Use this template when the spec doesn't say something incorrect, but what it says
is unclear, underspecified, or open to interpretation in ways that would produce
divergent implementations.

If the spec is flat-out wrong, use "Specification Bug."
If you want to add something new, use "Feature Request."
If you have a positioning question, use "Positioning Question."
-->

## Summary

<!-- One sentence: what is unclear and where. -->

## Affected Section

**SPEC.md section:**
**Line / paragraph reference (if applicable):**

## The Ambiguity

<!-- Describe what is unclear.
     Ideally: give two or more plausible interpretations of the current text. -->

**Interpretation A:**

**Interpretation B (or describe the ambiguity):**

## Why It Matters

<!-- What implementation divergence would this cause if left unresolved?
     Which governance primitive(s) could behave differently across implementations? -->

## Suggested Clarification

<!-- Optional: propose language that would resolve the ambiguity. -->

## References

<!-- Links to related Issues, PRs, mailing list threads, or external specs. -->
